description: Explicit CUSTOMER rejection of the VENDOR's proposed motion/scope/opportunity — the vendor's play is dead, so pursuit must be suppressed (never chase what the customer rejected). These are deliberately STRONG, specific patterns, distinct from a scope CONSTRAINT on a real opportunity (e.g. 'no rip-and-replace', 'keep AppDynamics'), which must NOT suppress. Generic linguistic shapes only — never a company/product/scenario literal. Logic: src/lib/signal-agent/rejectionGuard.ts.
_removed_over_broad: Dropped 'not a/an/our ... opportunity' (matched entity-boundary clarifications like 'not a separate expansion opportunity'), the decision/evaluation/budget 'no X exists|approved' variant (matched early-stage 'no commercial decision/budget yet', which is normal for a live validation), keeping only unambiguous rejections of the vendor's motion.
